purpose: Transform token and Pendle PT opportunity scope into a decision-grade investment analyst report while controlling parent context size through stage artifacts and subagent handoffs.

artifact_layout.return_contract: Return run_artifact_root, run-manifest.json, index.md, per-token directories, per-PT directories, and final verification path. Do not return loose report paths or raw evidence dumps.

global_rules.parent_context_policy: Parent reads workflow manifest, indexes, stage summaries, and final reports first. Parent expands raw evidence only to audit a disputed number or conclusion.
global_rules.subagent_output_policy: Subagents write artifacts to disk and return only artifact paths, verdicts, key numbers, blockers, and validation status.

stages.title: General asset mining
stages.role: Collect on-chain, issuer, backing, controls, liquidity, oracle, governance, security, and incident evidence for one token.

parallelization.reason: Each token has independent evidence collection and writes to isolated research directories.

subagent_context: token scope: chain_id, token address, symbol, intended use
requirements-brief.md if analyst readability is required
output directory for the specific token

stages.title: Asset-risk analyst report
stages.role: Convert token evidence into an analyst-readable token-level risk report.

parallelization.reason: Each analyst report is a single-candidate memo and does not require cross-token reasoning.

subagent_context: S1 handoff summary for the token
technical report path for the token

stages.title: PT market and economics analysis
stages.role: Identify exact Pendle PT market and quantify price, accounting asset, maturity, implied APY, liquidity, and PT-specific risks.

parallelization.reason: Each PT market has independent market/API identity and writes a separate memo.

subagent_context: PT scope: underlying symbol/address, maturity, chain, days label
validation: inherited token risk separated from PT-specific risk

stages.title: X/social mining for risk, return, and points
stages.role: Collect X/social claims about points, yield, PT APY, depeg, redemption, queue, and stress narratives for one token/PT scope.

parallelization.unit: one token/PT social scope per subagent
parallelization.reason: Each social search lane is independent and should not pollute the parent context with raw X results. Hermes delegated batch execution is capped at three children in this environment.

stages.skip_if: No points, social, or market-narrative upside/risk is in scope.
subagent_context: X-search safety constraints: read-only, no X write actions, mark degraded citations
validation: material claims have handle/date/URL or citation_degraded

stages.title: X/social synthesis
stages.role: Synthesize social evidence across scopes into cross-token return models, risk narratives, contradictions, and confidence boundaries.

parallelization.reason: This stage reasons across all social memos and should run once after S4 completes.

stages.title: Quantitative underwriting and decision memo
stages.role: Convert token, PT, and social evidence into ROI/APR, points EV, expected loss, price-stability certainty, and risk-adjusted decision outputs.

parallelization.reason: This stage compares candidates, applies consistent priors, and produces a single decision surface.

stages.title: Final verification
stages.role: Run structural, terminology, workspace, and decision-surface checks before reporting completion.

parallelization.reason: Verification must observe the final artifact set after all writes.
